ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  JSW Infrastructure Limited has incorporated a new wholly-owned subsidiary, JSW Kolkata Outer Harbour Container Terminal Private Limited, on July 10, 2026. This subsidiary is established as a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) to execute the recently awarded "Integrated Development of Outer Container Terminal & Berth no. 1" project at Netaji Subhash Dock, Kolkata, under a Design Build Finance Operate Transfer (DBFOT) public-private partnership model. This incorporation is a standard operational step following a major project award, signaling progress on a significant new port infrastructure development for JSWIL, with no apparent red flags in this filing.
